introduction: I enjoy reading across a wide range of topics. Some highlights are shown here:

books.title: Invisible Women by Caroline C. Perez
books.alt: Invisible Women by Caroline Criado Perez
books.takeaway: It made me realize how often design overlooks women's needs, particularly in health, safety, and efficiency across many study cases.

books.title: User Friendly by Cliff Kuang
books.alt: User Friendly by Cliff Kuang and Robert Fabricant
books.takeaway: A key takeaway for me is understanding how design shapes daily life and the benefits of designing with inclusivity, especially for disabilities.

books.title: Feel Good Productivity by Ali Abdaal
books.alt: Feel Good Productivity by Ali Abdaal
books.takeaway: It reminds me to enjoy the journey, rather than forcing a specific outcome. Feeling good, staying sincere, and approaching work with flexibility leads to real productivity.
